outcome_contract.why: Every reception screen should use a consistent themeable visual language. Inline styles override the CSS cascade, raw buttons bypass DS interaction patterns, and unflagged layout classes make theming harder to iterate. The prior bar-pos and till-safe theming passes fixed semantic tokens; this pass fixes structural compliance.
outcome_contract.intended_outcome_statement: All reception app components use DS Button for interactive elements, DS layout primitives where the ESLint rule flags violations, and contain zero inline style attributes. ESLint `ds/enforce-layout-primitives` warning count drops to 0.

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: 18 files with raw buttons; 4 files with inline styles; 14 ESLint layout warnings
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Inline styles block cascade; raw buttons inconsistent hover/focus; layout classes not themed
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Yes — verify DS Button props match existing button intent (ghost, outline, default variants)

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Existing buttons have hover/active states via manual className
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: DS Button provides consistent states automatically; risk of subtle visual delta on hover/active
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Yes — confirm DS Button variant matches each raw button's visual role

ESLint rule provides deterministic gate; TypeScript typecheck catches import errors
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Snapshot tests may need updates for className changes
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Yes — validate ESLint warning count hits 0 post-build

CSS class changes, no render path changes

stage_payload.scope_summary: Three categories of design system violation remain in the reception app after prior theming passes (bar-pos and till-safe theming overhauls are complete, semantic tokens are used throughout). This fact-find scopes and verifies the remaining violations before planning targeted fixes.
goals: Eliminate all inline `style={{}}` attributes that override the CSS cascade and block the theme system.
Replace all raw `<button>` elements with the DS `Button` component for consistent interaction states, focus rings, and accessibility.

Replace raw `flex`/`grid` className usage on elements flagged by `ds/enforce-layout-primitives` ESLint rule with DS layout primitives (`Inline`, `Stack`, `Cluster`, `Cover` from `@acme/design-system/primitives`).
non_goals: Semantic token compliance (already complete — zero hardcoded palette colours found in audit).
Converting layout classes on elements that are NOT flagged by the ESLint rule (the rule scopes correctly to leaf elements).
Design or UX changes — purely mechanical compliance fixes.
constraints: DS Button must be imported from `@acme/design-system/atoms` (established pattern throughout reception app).
DS layout primitives imported from `@acme/design-system/primitives` (established in SafeManagement.tsx, LoanedItemsList.tsx).
Reception app uses Turbopack — no webpack-specific import aliases needed.
CI-only tests; never run jest locally.

rehearsal_issues.Issues Found: [Advisory] withIconModal HOC needs extra care with asChild pattern
[Advisory] dynamic height calc may need design decision

process_topology.note: None: local code path only — no multi-step process, workflow, or CI/deploy lane changes.
